name: Do it up!
description: Do it up! - and nothing else! If, at times, you don&rsquo;t understand what&rsquo;s going on around you, then here you&rsquo;ll definitely understand everything - this is the place for you! At your disposal is a small town in which you can run, jump and walk. Move, have fun and remember - only up!
instructions: The movements are simple and intuitive - space - jump - double space - jump higher - W - forward - A - left - D - right - S - back You can also control the direction of the character using the arrows on the keyboard
tags: 3D, 3D Games, city, Highscore, jump, Jumping, OnlyUp, Physics, Race, run, running, unity, Unity3D
